name: Rending Needle: Conductor
additional_info: Upon applying 5 Metal Rods to a target, the Rods will converge into a Conductor Rod. Conductor Rods cannot be pulled. If an enemy affected by a Conductor Rod casts a Mantra, they will lose 5% of their maximum armor, and if that Mantra was a non-Ironsing/Bloodrend elemental Mantra, they will be afflicted with their Attunement's status effect, causing the Rod to fall off. Conductor Rods last 30 seconds or until a non-Ironsing/Bloodrend elemental Mantra is cast.
desc: 5 metal rods will combine into a conductor rod. If an enemy uses a non-Ironsing elemental mantra, they're dealt with their element back in return.
